analysis_text:
=== JOB DESCRIPTION ANALYSIS (use for precise tailoring) ===
Target Role: Web Developer
Company: PETNET

HIGH-PRIORITY KEYWORDS (mirror these exactly where truthful):
API, make, React, MongoDB, Github, developer, financial, services, hybrid, full, web developer, delivery, stack, petnet, node.js

EXACT PHRASES TO ECHO (include 3+ naturally in cover letter + resume):
- Web Developer | Hybrid PETNET, INC
- Professional Growth: We foster a culture of continuous learning and personal development
- How many years' experience do you have as a web developer
- Target the Full Stack Developer position slot where possible
- Eagerness to learn new codebases, research

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES (lead with matching evidence):
- Strong match on React (frontend), Node.js (v12+), MySQL for full-stack requirements
- Experience creating and integrating REST APIs
- Database modeling and implementing business logic (use MySQL + Prisma/MongoDB evidence
- Using Git/GitHub for repository work and team collaboration
- Working in Agile/Scrum team environments, participating in meetings, sprint delivery
- Eagerness to learn new codebases, research, and continuous improvement (highlight self-study + production delivery

ACTION VERBS TO MIRROR: research, support

GUIDANCE: Prioritize direct matches from master_resume.json. Reorder bullets so strongest evidence appears first. Use the exact words above in summary, bullets, and cover letter.
=== END ANALYSIS ===
